{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230500403A281A8008843EEB6128"}"},"total":655},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7393542448726016830","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结撒花！
文笔没啥可说的，我很少能看完整本御兽文，很好看。
缺点是人物性格塑造有点奇怪，配角对于文章的点缀色彩太少了。有个小坑没填，说实话我还蛮期待的和剑修联手摧毁神朝的。
但还是很爱，御兽文重点就是御兽嘛，虽然几个御兽个性描述不多，欠缺一些生动，但这个技能配置我还是爱的，每个小家伙都有自己独特的作用，不会像有些书莫名其妙非要凑够几个稀有属性。
总之，书荒的朋友可以瞅瞅，在我这边完全是合格的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721447045,"group_id":"7109051412331367455","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我永远都爱这样的我","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9l/ILGHvBCdweK15FyO43M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e44fdf16d3804bb99084974e0fb65564~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790376&x-signature=Om9Sv6FvTwftAmFTMwvMbRWiYwo%3D","user_id":"726092103029134","user_name":"人类Bibaboo"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"726092103029134","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7109051412331367455","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽+系统+家族+位面战争+无女主】
魏疆穿越到御兽为尊的世界，契约低级宠兽火鸦 ，同时觉醒加点系统。
为什么你的火鸦修为提升这么快?
为什么你的火鸦技能这么强?
该死的，这是火鸦?
魏疆打开系统面板:
“系统，提高火鸦血脉浓度！”
火鸦-赤焰金乌-烈日金乌……
系统在手，什么垃圾我都能给它加点成神兽！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e9fc75bde96c231b74f50be6fff656bb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"加奶不加糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7109051412331367455","book_name":"全民御兽，开局一只鸦","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2268人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7109054256304521767","read_count":"2268","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1000727"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"491","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,宠物,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/74f2c0ee8bc9515ff9040b74e2e74d22~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779397240&x-signature=grA5aIX4Wm81V2YjIyszHVKg%2Fuc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3944679251652199","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"544"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230500403A281A8008843EEB6128"}"},"relate_info
